##MEASURED CHEMISTRY=Pb_1.00_(Al_2.60_Fe^3+^_0.40_)[(As_0.85_S_0.15_)O_4_]_2_((OH)_5.30_(H_2_O)_0.70_) ; = light material: Pb_1.00_(Al_2.76_Fe^3+^_0.24_)[(As_0.75_S_0.25_)O_4_]_2_((OH)_5.49_(H_2_O)_0.51_) = dark material:  OH  by charge balance  traces Cu, Zn, S
